nasb.text: You have shriveled me up, It has become a witness; And my leanness rises up against me, It testifies to my face.

esv.text: And he has shriveled me up, which is a witness against me, and my leanness has risen up against me; it testifies to my face.

cnv.text: 又把我捆綁起來。’這就作為證據； 我身體的枯瘦也當面作證反對我。

ccb.text: 你榨干了我， 使我骨瘦如柴， 这成了我的罪证。
